title: Coin Master

Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards!

notes:

title: Hunting Sniper : Rival
notes:
Hunting Sniper Update Notes
NEW FEATURE: Guilds are here! Join a Guild, chat with members, climb the Guild Ranking, and more.
NEW SEASON TOUR: Season Tour 26 is now live with new animals, fresh challenges, and valuable rewards.
NEW BULLETS: Discover new themed Bullets with unique attributes to sharpen your hunt.
PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION: Fixed known issues and improved overall game performance.

title: Stranger Things: 1984
notes: We've squashed bugs and made behind-the-scenes improvements to bring Netflix members the best possible gameplay experience.

title: Ludo Club・Fun Dice Board Game

title: Haunted Merge: Horror Story

title: Merge Mansion: Puzzles & Story
notes:
Summer has arrived in Hopewell Bay, and there's plenty to look forward to in our latest update!

• Maddie and her friends are gearing up for an exciting soccer watch party.
• Discover and restore the Hallway of Curiosities, our newest area filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered.
• Enjoy a lineup of fun seasonal events and brand-new Season Passes packed with rewards.
• We've also made a variety of improvements and fixes to keep your experience running smoothly.

See you in Hopewell Bay!

title: My Garden Tale
notes: Performance improvements and bug fixes for a smoother experience.

title: Love and Deepspace
notes:
Version 5.0 of Love and Deepspace [Throne of Eros] Is Now Released!

[New 5-Star Memories]
-Before a dominant will, even the cosmos bows. The limited Wish Pool [Throne of Eros] is now available with the new Memory series. You can obtain limited-time pulls, Memory-themed Outfits, and selectable event-limited 5-Star Memories.
-Participate in the [Illusia Locus] event, and use the Kindling Guide to claim five new 4-Star Memories for free!

[New Home Feature]
